title: COMPETITIVE INTEGRATED EMPLOYMENT - 211info
text: RELAY RESOURCES COMPETITIVE INTEGRATED EMPLOYMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides personalized career counseling, employment training, and employment guidance to individuals who experience barriers to employment. 5312 NE 148th Avenue Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Adults with disabilities and neurodivergent individuals. Includes those with physical limitations, learning disabilities, intellectual and/or developmental disabilities, and mental health conditions. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 261-1266 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 261-1266 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information or to schedule an appointment. The main campus is closed to visitors without appointments. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Certain jobs may need documentation of a physical or mental disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Beaverton, Hillsboro, Pendleton, Portland, The Dalles, and Umatilla SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Campus is closed to the general public. Services: Disability Related Center Based Employment Job Finding Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Job Training Formats * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - ABILIT PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RELAY RESOURCES
